Double Major

Internship

Program Objectives

The Anesthesia technicians will be able to prepare the patient preoperatively, support the anesthesiologist during the operation, and control the patient after the operation. Also graduates of Anesthesia program have the knowledge of advanced anesthesia machines and different anesthesia techniques, sterilization and emergency patient care.

Our students do internship which lasts for 30 working days, so they can reinforce their theoretical information with practical experiences, recognize their working field and make acquainted with their future co-workers.

Career Opportunities

All those who graduate from anesthesia program can work private and public hospitals, the operating room anesthesia, the recovery room, intensive care unit, respiratory therapy unit, resuscitation, emergency services, pain treatment and research departments.

Vertical Transfer Opportunities

Graduates of this program can transfer to Emergency and Disaster Management, Nursing, Nursing and Health Services undergraduate programs.
